/opt/homebrew/bin/arm-linux-gnueabi-g++ --sysroot=/Users/mirandadiazhernandez/pocketbook-sdk/FRSCSDK/arm-none-linux-gnueabi/sysroot -include /Users/mirandadiazhernandez/Downloads/pb-reading-tracker/stdlib_fix.h --sysroot=/Users/mirandadiazhernandez/pocketbook-sdk/FRSCSDK/arm-none-linux-gnueabi/sysroot -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pbreadstats.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pbreadstats.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbreadstats.dir/src/tracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbreadstats.dir/src/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbreadstats.dir/src/metadata.cpp.o -o pbreadstats  -linkview -lsqlite3 -lz
